121→    @Test
122→    fun testFormattingSecondFractions() {
123→        fun check(nanoseconds: Int, minLength: Int?, maxLength: Int?, string: String) {
124→            fun DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithTime.secondFractionWithThisLength() {
125→                when {
126→                    minLength != null && maxLength != null -> secondFraction(minLength, maxLength)
127→                    maxLength != null -> secondFraction(maxLength = maxLength)
128→                    minLength != null -> secondFraction(minLength = minLength)
129→                    else -> secondFraction()
130→                }
131→            }
132→            val format = LocalTime.Format { secondFractionWithThisLength() }
133→            val time = LocalTime(0, 0, 0, nanoseconds)
134→            assertEquals(string, format.format(time))
135→            val format2 = LocalTime.Format {
136→                hour(); minute(); second()
137→                char('.'); secondFractionWithThisLength()
138→            }
139→            val time2 = format2.parse("123456.$string")
140→            assertEquals((string + "0".repeat(9 - string.length)).toInt(), time2.nanosecond)
141→        }
142→        check(1, null, null, "000000001")
143→        check(1, null, 9, "000000001")
144→        check(1, null, 8, "0")
145→        check(1, null, 7, "0")
146→        check(999_999_999, null, null, "999999999")
147→        check(999_999_999, null, 9, "999999999")
148→        check(999_999_999, null, 8, "99999999")
149→        check(999_999_999, null, 7, "9999999")
150→        check(100000000, null, null, "1")
151→        check(100000000, null, 4, "1")
152→        check(100000000, null, 3, "1")
153→        check(100000000, null, 2, "1")
154→        check(100000000, null, 1, "1")
155→        check(100000000, 4, null, "1000")
156→        check(100000000, 3, null, "100")
157→        check(100000000, 2, null, "10")
158→        check(100000000, 1, null, "1")
159→        check(100000000, 4, 4, "1000")
160→        check(100000000, 3, 4, "100")
161→        check(100000000, 3, 3, "100")
162→        check(100000000, 2, 3, "10")
163→        check(100000000, 2, 2, "10")
164→        check(987654321, null, null, "987654321")
165→        check(987654320, null, null, "98765432")
166→        check(987654300, null, null, "9876543")
167→        check(987654000, null, null, "987654")
168→        check(987650000, null, null, "98765")
169→        check(987600000, null, null, "9876")
170→        check(987000000, null, null, "987")
171→        check(980000000, null, null, "98")
172→        check(900000000, null, null, "9")
173→        check(0, null, null, "0")
174→        check(987654321, null, 9, "987654321")
175→        check(987654321, null, 8, "98765432")
176→        check(987654321, null, 7, "9876543")
177→        check(987654321, null, 6, "987654")
178→        check(987654321, null, 5, "98765")
179→        check(987654321, null, 4, "9876")
180→        check(987654321, null, 3, "987")
181→        check(987654321, null, 2, "98")
182→        check(987654321, null, 1, "9")
183→    }

 12→class UtcOffsetFormatTest {
 13→
 14→    @Test
 15→    fun testErrorHandling() {
 16→        val format = UtcOffset.Format {
 17→            isoOffset(
 18→                zOnZero = true,
 19→                useSeparator = true,
 20→                outputMinute = WhenToOutput.ALWAYS,
 21→                outputSecond = WhenToOutput.IF_NONZERO
 22→            )
 23→        }
 24→        assertEquals(UtcOffset(hours = -4, minutes = -30), format.parse("-04:30"))
 25→        val error = assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { format.parse("-04:60") }
 26→        assertContains(error.message!!, "60")
 27→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { format.parse("-04:XX") }
 28→    }
 29→
 30→    @Test
 31→    fun testLenientIso8601() {

145→        }
146→        test(offsets, UtcOffset.Formats.FOUR_DIGITS)
147→        // formatting that loses precision and can't be parsed back:

151→            UtcOffset(-0, -0, -1) to "-0000",

165→    @Test
166→    fun testDoc() {
167→        val format = UtcOffset.Format {
168→          optional("GMT") {
169→            offsetHours(Padding.NONE)
170→            char(':')
171→            offsetMinutesOfHour()
172→            optional {
173→              char(':')
174→              offsetSecondsOfMinute()
175→            }
176→          }
177→        }
178→        assertEquals("GMT", UtcOffset.ZERO.format(format))
179→        assertEquals("+4:30:15", UtcOffset(4, 30, 15).format(format))
180→    }
181→
182→    private fun test(strings: Map<UtcOffset, Pair<String, Set<String>>>, format: DateTimeFormat<UtcOffset>) {
183→        for ((offset, stringsForDate) in strings) {
184→            val (canonicalString, otherStrings) = stringsForDate
185→            assertEquals(canonicalString, format.format(offset), "formatting $offset with $format")
186→            assertEquals(offset, format.parse(canonicalString), "parsing '$canonicalString' with $format")
187→            for (otherString in otherStrings) {
188→                assertEquals(offset, format.parse(otherString), "parsing '$otherString' with $format")
189→            }
190→        }
191→    }
192→}
